name: cowart
description: A native Codex widget canvas powered by tldraw and built for visual thinking, image generation, and annotation-driven edits.

interface.shortDescription: Create, annotate, and generate on a native infinite-canvas widget in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Cowart brings a tldraw-powered native widget canvas into Codex for visual planning and creative iteration. Open a project-backed canvas, sketch ideas, place AI image holders, generate images into selected slots, and turn annotated screenshots into revised image outputs while keeping canvas data in the user's project workspace.
defaultPrompt: Open the Cowart canvas for this project.
Use my Cowart annotation screenshot to generate a clean revised image beside the original.
Generate a new image into the selected Cowart AI image holder.
